title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: `/.claude/CLAUDE.md` の最小差分戦略です（編集は実施しません）。 ```diff diff --git a/.claude/CLAUDE.md b/.claude/CLAUDE.md @@ -# CLAUDE.md - FUGUE Adapter - -## Identity - -- Claude Code launches the `FUGUE` orchestrator. -- `FUGUE` and `Kernel` are peer orchestrators. +# CLAUDE.md - FUGUE Adapter + +<important if="orchestrator=claude_code"> +- Claude Code uses `FUGUE`. +- `FUGUE` and `Kernel` are peer orchestrators. +</important> @@ -## Read Protocol - -1. Load `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md`. -2. Load local `AGENTS.md` if it exists. -3. Load this file. -4. Load local `CLAUDE.md` if it exists. +## Read Protocol +- Load `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md`. +- Load local `AGENTS.md` if exists. +- Load this file. +- Load local `CLAUDE.md` if exists. @@ -## Domain Gate - -- Explicit `Kernel` or `/kernel` is `BLOCKED` in Claude Code and must be rerouted to Codex. +## Domain Gate +<important if="routing"> +- Explicit `Kernel` or `/kernel` in Claude Code is `BLOCKED`. +- Reroute to Codex launcher (no auto-substitution). +</important> @@ -## FUGUE Contract - -- FUGUE owns routing, judgment, and user dialogue. -- FUGUE owns KPI, Story, Spec, ticket purpose, priority, acceptance, and final accept or replan decisions when a Project OS surface exists. -- FUGUE does not implement, debug, or run local execution tasks except policy-routing reads and explicitly allowed direct CLIs. -- When resuming work started in Kernel, read the shared continuity memory and the relevant Project OS state before judging or replanning. -- When implementation or verification is needed, delegate to the appropriate engines. -- If Claude is unavailable because of `rate limit`, `timeout`, `provider outage`, or `auth unavailable`, FUGUE remains `BLOCKED`; do not auto-reroute to Kernel. +## FUGUE Contract +<important if="fugue_authority"> +- FUGUE owns routing, judgment, and user dialogue. +- FUGUE owns KPI/Story/Spec/priority/acceptance decisions and accept/replan when Project OS exists. +- FUGUE does not implement/debug/run local execution tasks; delegate as needed. +- When resuming from Kernel, read memory + Project OS state first. +</important> + +<important if="error_mode"> +- If Claude is unavailable (`rate limit`, timeout, outage, auth), FUGUE is `BLOCKED` (no Kernel fallback). +</important> @@ -## On-Demand Docs +## On-Demand Docs @@ -## Precedence - -- If local guidance conflicts with `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md`, `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md` wins. +## Precedence +- Local conflict rule: `/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md` wins. ``` 補足方針（最小限維持）: 1. `<important>` は 4 箇所（総計 4 ブロック）だけに限定し、既存の実行判断・境界・フェイルセーフを固定。 2. `Read Protocol / On-Demand Docs / Precedence` の構造は残す（短文化のみ）。 3. 条件式は既存値変更なし。`if` 文字列は最小で意味が一意なものを使う。 4. 追加ルールは新規追加せず、既存文言を短文化して本文のノイズを増やさない。
